title: Navkar Corporation is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Navkar Corporation is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Navkar Corporation family as a Warehouse Manager in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Navkar Corporation:
Navkar Corporation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navkar Corporation!
